title: Beautiful and Realistic 6 Branch Berry Artificial Flowers for Xmas(white)
features: -【Lifelike Artificial Berry Stems】Our artificial berry stems are meticulously crafted to mimic the appearance of real berries, presenting a lifelike, beautiful, and shiny decorative accent.

-【 Home and Party Decor】Perfect for various settings, these artificial berry stems are ideal for home decorations, party decorations, dining table embellishments, Christmas trees, Christmas wreaths, garlands, packaging, and DIY crafts. Create a festive atmosphere for weddings, birthdays, and baby showers.
-【Premium Quality Material】Crafted from foam, these berry stems ensure durability and long-lasting beauty. The vibrant colors stay intact, bringing a lively touch to your decor.

-【Optimal Size】Each stem measures approximately 35cm in length, providing you with ample decorating versatility. Arrange them in vases, incorporate them into floral arrangements, or use them as standalone decorations.
-【Package Contents】Each order includes 6 bunches of simulation berries, allowing you to easily incorporate them into your desired decor style.
description: Feature： -Our artificial berry stems are covered look lifelike, beautiful and shiny. -Wide range of applications-very suitable for your home and party decorations, dining tables, Christmas trees, Christmas wreaths, garlands, packaging, DIY crafts, very suitable for weddings, birthdays and baby showers. Details： *Material:Foam *Color:picture color *Size:Length 35cm（about） Package Contents: 6pcs/bunch Simulation berries
